name: executive-agent
description: Executive / Agent layer — BDI deliberation loop with DLPFC-modelled goal stack, OFC value scoring, ACC policy-violation detection, and Basal Ganglia commit/suppress/abort pathways. Manages agent identity, persistent goals, and OPA policy enforcement.

skills.description: Add a goal to the BDI goal stack with priority and optional constraints
Return the ranked active goal stack
Run OPA policy evaluation; return allow + violations
Append an identity delta to the self-model (append-only)
Transition a goal to DEFERRED/FAILED and cancel the running Workflow
Return current drive variable state from the affective module
